title: Stream filter and collect
description: Java Streams: filter a list to matching elements. Functional and readable.

title: Stream map with method reference
description: Transform every element using a method reference. Clean and concise.

title: Optional chain with fallback
description: Null-safe operation chain with a default value. Goodbye NullPointerException.

title: Create immutable list (Java 9+)
description: Create an immutable list in one line. Can't add/remove, but fast and safe.

title: Map computeIfAbsent pattern
description: Get or create a list in a map. Essential for grouping operations.

title: Join list to string
description: Join a collection of strings with a delimiter. Clean and efficient.

title: Group by property with Collectors
description: Group stream elements by a property. The Java way to do SQL GROUP BY.

title: Define a Record (Java 16+)
description: Immutable data class with auto-generated constructor, getters, equals, hashCode.

title: Pattern matching instanceof (Java 16+)
description: Cast in the instanceof check itself. No separate cast, no ClassCastException.

title: Switch expression (Java 14+)
description: Switch as an expression, not a statement. Arrow syntax, no fall-through.

title: Sum a list of numbers
description: Sum an integer list with streams. mapToInt + sum is cleaner than reduce.

title: Try-with-resources
description: Auto-close resources after use. No finally block needed. Always use this.

title: Async chain with CompletableFuture
description: Non-blocking async operations chained together. Java's answer to promises.

command: String msg = String.format("Hello %s, you have %d messages", name, count);
title: Format string
description: String.format with printf-style formatting. Classic and reliable.

title: Sort list by property (descending)
description: Sort objects by a property, reversed. Comparator.comparing is clean and readable.

title: Spring Boot REST controller
description: A basic Spring REST controller template. The bread and butter of Spring Boot.

title: Spring Service with constructor injection
description: Spring service with constructor injection and @Transactional. The right way.
